0.0: monray ga ne,
3.86: yaw nqa nkis raral hiya ga ,kahul sqa son mha i
9.36: (raral raral bably, yaw na bnkis ay)nkis balay yaw ay
14.48: baha msa pinpongan maku ay, ga iyat mha htgan mwani ga.
